title: Arkadelphia Locksmith | Mobile Service | Arkey Lock
metaDesc: Mobile locksmith in Arkadelphia, AR near HSU, OBU & DeGray Lake. Car keys, lockouts & rekeys at your door. Call Arkey Locksmith at (501) 617-8872.
heroSub: Arkadelphia sits south of Hot Springs on I-30, the Clark County seat and home to Henderson State and Ouachita Baptist. Arkey Locksmith comes right to you for car keys, lockouts, and rekeys — on campus, downtown, or out at DeGray Lake.

sections.html:
Locksmith Service for Arkadelphia & Clark County

Arkadelphia is the Clark County seat and a true college town, home to both Henderson State University and Ouachita Baptist University right across the road from each other. Add a historic downtown, the I-30 corridor, and DeGray Lake just up the highway, and you have a busy mix of students, families, and weekend visitors. Arkey Locksmith brings a fully stocked mobile shop to your door in Arkadelphia, so a lost key or a lockout never has to wreck your day — or your class schedule.

Auto & Student Keys

Locked out or lost the only key to your car? We cut and program car keys, fobs, transponder keys, and smart keys on site — in a dorm lot, an apartment complex, or roadside on I-30.

Home & Rentals

Rekeys after a move or between student tenants, new deadbolts, and house lockouts for Arkadelphia’s neighborhoods and rental properties.

Campus & Business

Rekeys, master key systems, and access control for the shops, offices, and rental landlords serving the HSU and OBU community.

Mobile Locksmith Built for a College Town

In a town built around two universities, lockouts and lost keys come with the territory — students locking keys in the car between classes, fobs lost somewhere on campus, apartments turning over every semester. A mobile locksmith fixes all of it fast. We load the van with key blanks, programming gear, and lock hardware so most jobs finish in one trip, right where you are parked.

  • Car, truck & SUV keys cut and programmed on site
  • Dorm, apartment, and home lockouts opened without damage
  • Rekeys between student tenants and after a move
  • New deadbolts and stronger locks on rentals and homes
  • Help with keys for vehicles and boats out at DeGray Lake

Neighborhoods & Areas We Cover in Arkadelphia

Arkadelphia runs from its downtown square out to the university district and the lake country beyond. If you are anywhere in or around the city, we will come to you. Areas we regularly reach include:

  • Downtown Arkadelphia and the Clark County courthouse square
  • The Henderson State (HSU) and Ouachita Baptist (OBU) campus district
  • Student apartments and rentals along Pine Street and Main Street
  • Neighborhoods off Caddo Street and 10th Street
  • DeGray Lake, the resort state park, and the Caddo River
  • Caddo Valley and the I-30 corridor (Exits 73 and 78)

Not sure how to describe where you are? A street name and a nearby landmark — a dorm, a store, or an I-30 exit number — is plenty for us to find you.

Why Locksmith Calls Happen Around Arkadelphia

A college town and lake area sees its own steady set of lock-and-key moments. Students lock keys in the car or lose the only fob far from home. Apartments and rentals turn over every semester, and landlords want the locks rekeyed so old keys are useless. Families want stronger deadbolts on homes near campus. And out at DeGray Lake, folks lock keys in the truck while the boat is in the water.

We handle all of it on site. Our car keys cost far less than the dealership, and because we come to you, there is no tow bill and no waiting days for a key to ship. One important note: we do not bill insurance — locksmith work is paid directly, and we keep our pricing straightforward so you know what you are paying before we start.

Quick Reach Down I-30 From Hot Springs

Arkadelphia is a short run south from Hot Springs by way of I-30 and DeGray Lake, so we can get to you without the long wait. Arkey Locksmith is locally owned — you reach us directly, not a national call center routing your job to a stranger. We are fully mobile, licensed and insured, with more than 15 years of experience, and we offer discounts for veterans and seniors (and we’re happy to help students in a bind). Tell us your address or a nearby exit, and we will head your way. One thing we do not do is safe work — for that we will point you to the right pro.

faqs.a: Yes. Arkadelphia is part of our regular service area. We are a fully mobile locksmith based out of Hot Springs and travel down I-30 to Arkadelphia and across Clark County for car keys, lockouts, and home or business work.

faqs.q: How fast can you get to me in Arkadelphia?
faqs.a: Arkadelphia is a short drive south of Hot Springs by I-30 and DeGray Lake, so we can usually reach you quickly. We are open 24/7 — call (501) 617-8872, give us your location, and we will give you an honest arrival time.

faqs.q: Can you make a car key for a student at HSU or OBU?
faqs.a: Yes. We come right to campus, a dorm lot, or an apartment and cut and program many transponder keys, fobs, and smart keys on site — for far less than the dealership, with no tow. Bring your photo ID and proof you own the vehicle.

faqs.q: Can you rekey a rental or apartment between tenants?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Rekeying between student tenants is one of our most common jobs in Arkadelphia. We rekey the locks so the last renter’s keys no longer work and the new tenant gets a clean set, and we can add stronger deadbolts while we are there.

faqs.q: I locked my keys in the truck at DeGray Lake — can you help?
faqs.a: Yes. We open vehicle and home lockouts without damaging your door or window, and we travel out to DeGray Lake, the resort state park, and the ramps near Arkadelphia. Just share your spot when you call and we will come to you.

Yes. Arkey Locksmith is licensed and insured with over 15 years of experience, and we offer discounts for veterans and seniors. Please note we do not service safes, and locksmith work is paid directly rather than billed through insurance.

keywords: Arkadelphia locksmith, locksmith Arkadelphia AR, mobile locksmith, car keys, lockout service, home rekey, Clark County locksmith, DeGray Lake locksmith
